name: edexcelgcsehistorycme
description: Edexcel GCSE History Paper 2 Conflict in the Middle East Mastery

scripts.build: npm run bundle && vite build && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.readdirSync('.').forEach(file => { if (file.endsWith('.js') && (file.startsWith('chunk-') || file.startsWith('games-') || file.startsWith('workbook_data-') || file.startsWith('flashcard_upgrades-') || file === 'app.js' || file === 'questions.js')) { fs.copyFileSync(file, 'dist/' + file); } }); fs.copyFileSync('later_stages_games.html', 'dist/later_stages_games.html'); fs.copyFileSync('falling_blocks.html', 'dist/falling_blocks.html'); fs.copyFileSync('interactive_timeline.html', 'dist/interactive_timeline.html');"
